name: BMM_INDEXED_CONTAINER_TYPE
documentation: Meta-type of linear container type that indexes the contained items in the manner of a standard Hash table, map or dictionary.

index_type.name: index_type
index_type.documentation: Type of the element index, typically `String` or `Integer`, but may be a numeric type or indeed any type from which a hash value can be derived.

type_name.name: type_name
type_name.documentation: Return full type name, e.g. `HashMap<String, ELEMENT>`.
